title: Godrej Properties is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Properties is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
